title: 3Sum
description: Given integer array nums, return all triplets [nums[i], nums[j], nums[k]] such that i!=j!=k and sum is 0.

solution.python:
class Solution:
    def threeSum(self, nums):
        nums.sort()
        res = []
        for i in range(len(nums)-2):
            if i > 0 and nums[i] == nums[i-1]: continue
            l, r = i+1, len(nums)-1
            while l < r:
                s = nums[i] + nums[l] + nums[r]
                if s < 0: l += 1
                elif s > 0: r -= 1
                else:
                    res.append([nums[i], nums[l], nums[r]])
                    while l < r and nums[l] == nums[l+1]: l += 1
                    while l < r and nums[r] == nums[r-1]: r -= 1
                    l += 1; r -= 1
        return res
